allowed_claims: R8 stop-loss diagnosis can explain why R8 is diagnostic-only.
Product may display R8 as failure diagnosis and outcome replay evidence.
claim_boundary: R8 learnable mechanism artifact. It supports guarded mechanism-causal interaction simulation, interval/risk diagnosis, attribution, and bounded operator update candidates only; it is not point-prediction evidence, not field validation, and not runtime default authorization.

diagnosis.evidence: R8 wins only risk_ranking_quality; R7 v2 or R6/static baselines still win trend, interval, false alarm, and static-miss recovery metrics.
diagnosis.implication: R8 cannot be claimed as a stronger Product core method.
Robustness evidence can be shown as diagnostic guard output, not as runtime authorization.
Product can use R8 for failure diagnosis and outcome replay, but not field-validated claims.

recommended_next_tracks.entry_condition: new operator must beat R7 v2 on more than one metric and pass L1 gate
recommended_next_tracks.goal: replace fixed current-proxy heuristics with a stronger transferable mechanism learner

recommended_next_tracks.entry_condition: at least one field/customer outcome has aligned scenario, segment, and mechanism trace
recommended_next_tracks.goal: collect or ingest real outcome evidence that can validate trend, interval, ranking, and false-alarm control

recommended_next_tracks.entry_condition: all blocked claims remain source-backed and runtime-default false
recommended_next_tracks.goal: turn blocked R8 evidence into customer-facing risk boundary, replay, and learning workflow
